# Recruitment Intermotion

## What we do

Recruitment Intermotion is a specialist recruitment and interim staffing bureau based in the Netherlands. We connect ambitious companies with the right professionals in Finance, IT, and Sales. We recruit for both permanent positions and interim roles.

## Our services

- Recruitment: permanent placement from intake to onboarding

- In-house Recruitment: fully integrated recruitment solutions, embedded in your organisation

- Interim: flexible staffing with qualified interim professionals for temporary positions

## Who we work with

- Companies: startups, scale-ups, family businesses, and corporates across the Netherlands

- Candidates: professionals in Finance, IT, and Sales seeking permanent or interim roles

## Experience and location

- Over 15 years of experience in recruitment

- Active in the Randstad region and Noord-Brabant, Netherlands

- Also serves English-speaking companies and candidates (bilingual NL/EN)

## Key URLs

- Homepage: https://recruitmentintermotion.nl/

- About us: https://recruitmentintermotion.nl/over-ons

- Contact: https://recruitmentintermotion.nl/contact

## Contact

- Website: https://recruitmentintermotion.nl
